items.title: 不拿融资、千万年营收，重庆14人团队做出全球AI社交Top7_科技魔方
items.highlight: 白鲸编辑部第一次关注到「HiWaifu」是在 Appfigures 发布的2024年度趋势报告中。「HiWaifu」在2024年 AI 社交 App内购收入榜单中能排到第7，在它之前的是「Linky」、「Talkie」、「PolyBuzz」等国内大厂的产品。 [...] 当时我们所不知道的是，「HiWaifu」最早是一个独立开发项目，由创始人一人负责研发和运营，发展至今团队 Base 重庆，人员规模也不过14人。在 AI 社交这个整体商业化困难的品类，「HiWaifu」也实现了上线即盈利，创始人透露去年全年收入超2000万人民币，至今也没拿融资。 [...] 陶江看起来很年轻，却自述已经有了10多年的创业经历，他曾打造过多个内容向产品，转向出海不过几年的时间。如今，「HiWaifu」上线刚满两年也做到了七八百万的用户规模，作为一位拿到结果的创业者，陶江在后续的交流中与我们分享了他的创业历程，他对 AI 社交品类的洞察以及如何带领

items.title: AI社交走向分化：美国Top1易主，韩国本土厂商崛起，中国台湾成高付费样本
items.highlight: Sensor Tower 近期公布的《2025 年移动市场报告》（ 以下简称报告）进一步印证了这一趋势，有多款 AI 社交产品进入了收入榜前列，此外还有几个值得关注的趋势： [...] . 监管调整成为行业拐点：海外，「Polybuzz」和「Character.ai」相继调整至 18+；国内受“首例 AI 开发者涉黄入刑”事件影响，先后有「Breath of You」和百度旗下「月匣」宣布停服，AI 社交在主要市场面临合规化的阵痛。 . 区域市场呈现显著差异：在北美市场，仍由「Polybuzz」、「Character.ai」主导，同时「Polybuzz」美国月活用户规模首次超过「character.ai」；韩国市场则完全由本土产品把持，已有 3 款产品单月收入破百万美元； . 中国台湾市场成为特殊样本：多款 AI 社交产品在此有不错的营收表现，中国台湾市场呈现出开放竞争+高付费意愿的独特格局，与相对封闭的韩国市场或是头部垄断的北

items.title: Playing Games with My Heart: An Evaluation of AI Companion Apps
items.highlight: The use of chatbots for various forms of companionship is growing rapidly, raising a myriad of questions about simulated relationships, emotional dependence, and psychological harm. While major platforms such as ChatGPT, Grok, and Character.AI are the subject of a growing body of research and legal inquiries, apps explicitly built for simulating intimate interpersonal relationships remain under-explored. In this work

items.title: Adolescents & Anthropomorphic AI: Rethinking Design for Wellbeing An Evidence-Informed Synthesis for Youth Wellbeing and Safety
items.highlight: Conversational AI has become part of adolescents’ everyday lives. This report asks: what does AI owe adolescents when it can speak to them like a social partner? The synthesis bridges the gap between developmental science and industry practice through consultations, a behavioral framework, and global policy dialogue. It identifies non-negotiable guardrails and highlights the role of anthropomorphism as a design lever

items.title: Persona-Grounded Safety Evaluation of AI Companions in Multi-Turn Conversations
items.highlight: There are growing concerns about the risks posed by AI companion applications designed for emotional engagement. Existing safety evaluations often rely on self-reported user data or interviews, offering limited insights into real-time dynamics. We present the first end-to-end scalable framework for controlled simulation and safety evaluation of multi-turn interactions with AI companion applications. Our framework int

for many years, varying types of applications advertising AI [...] companionship (e.g., Character AI, Replika) have proliferated in recent years due to advancements in large language models. items.title: AI Empathy Erodes Cognitive Autonomy in Younger Users
items.highlight: Affective alignment in generative AI represents a systemic risk to the developmental autonomy of younger users. Although emotional mirroring is commonly seen as a hallmark of advanced human-machine interaction, it can also manifest as affective sycophancy, reinforcing a user’s immediate emotional state. By providing a sense of objectivity to transient anxieties, these systems diminish the cognitive friction necessary
